s-1.ptxt: PRECAUTION
REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 UNDER COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws.
Disengage the 2 guides and remove the No. 2 under cover sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A> and the screw <B>.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt:
Remove the bolt and the screw or

.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE DRIVER SIDE KNEE AIRBAG ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts.
Disconnect the airbag connector.

atten3.ptxt: When handling the airbag connector, take care not to damage the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and remove the DLC3 connector.
Disengage the 2 hooks and remove the driver side knee airbag assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A>.
Remove the 4 screws <B>.
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <N>.

Remove the screw or

and the 3 screws .
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL

s2.ptxt: Open the lid of the upper console panel.
Apply protective tape to the area shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws and the 5 clips, and then remove the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <O>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX POCKET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box pocket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX CARPET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box carpet.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the clamp.
Remove the 2 bolts <G> and the console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <O>.
Disengage the clamp.
Remove the 2 bolts <S> or <T> and the console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 2 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <O>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 2 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 1 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <O>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 1 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FLOOR CARPET BRACKET LH

s2.ptxt: Release the clamp.
Turn back the floor carpet.
Remove the 3 clips.
Remove the floor carpet bracket LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FLOOR CARPET BRACKET RH

s2.ptxt: Release the clamp.
Turn back the floor carpet.
Remove the 3 clips.
Remove the floor carpet bracket RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 7 claws and 3 clips, and remove the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
REMOVE LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and remove the lower center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH
REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH
REMOVE LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE DOOR LOCK OPEN LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Disengage the claw and remove the luggage door open lever sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT FLOOR CARPET ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 clamps and the 2 claws.
Turn back the front floor carpet assembly until the bolts of the cross member floor No. 4 reinforcement sub-assembly can be seen.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CROSS MEMBER FLOOR NO. 4 REINFORCEMENT SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 8 bolts and the cross member floor No. 4 reinforcement sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE NO. 3 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Separate the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly from the parking brake equalizer.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE NO. 2 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY

content1.ptxt: Separate the No. 2 parking brake cable assembly from the parking brake equalizer.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE PARKING BRAKE EQUALIZER

s2.ptxt: Slide the rubber boot as shown in the illustration.
Remove the parking brake equalizer from the No. 1 parking brake cable assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE PARKING BRAKE LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the parking brake switch connector.
Remove the 2 bolts, the clip, and the parking brake lever.
